about.illustrationAlt: Heart character waving in the EZPZ illustration style
about.illustrationCaption: Illustration pulled from the EZPZ arts library.
about.intro: EZPZ is a project created by entrepreneurs who have been working in the coffee industry for many years. This platform was designed to simplify production, no matter what your needs are.

paragraphs: Our solution is made for anyone who wants to easily create and produce their own coffee bags.

Whether it's to offer a unique gift to someone or to launch large-scale production, our platform streamlines every step of the process. We can produce a single bag or hundreds of them, at a low cost, to suit your reality and your needs.

about.title: About EZPZ

cart.emptyDescription: Add some custom coffee bags to get started.
cart.taxNote: Taxes and shipping calculated at checkout
cart.title: Your cart

coffee.illustrationAlt: Coffee cup mascot flashing a peace sign
coffee.illustrationCaption: Our coffee mascot, pulled from the EZPZ arts pack.
coffee.intro: At EZPZ, we source our beans from passionate producers who cultivate exceptional coffee with rich, balanced aromas.

paragraphs: Our roasting, carried out in Montréal at Canadian Roasting Company, highlights the full complexity of each origin.

Every bag is roasted with precision to guarantee an optimal experience — a cup worthy of the finest baristas, sure to delight your clients, your employees, or anyone who has the pleasure of enjoying your coffee.

coffee.title: An exceptional coffee, from bean to cup.

contact.intro: Have questions about your order, custom bags, or anything else? We're here to help.

paragraphs: For any inquiries, please reach out to us at help@ezpz.coffee. We typically respond within 24–48 hours. You can also visit us at our location: 3780 Rue Saint-Patrick, Montréal QC H4E 1A2.

contact.title: Get in touch

allergens.answer: Yes — our coffee contains no allergens, additives, or flavorings. It is naturally gluten-free and vegan.
allergens.question: Is your coffee allergen-free?

roastingLocation.answer: We roast all our coffees in the southwest of Montréal, at the Canadian Roasting Society.
roastingLocation.question: Where do you roast your coffee?

specialty.answer: Specialty coffee is evaluated and regulated by the Specialty Coffee Association. A specialty coffee must score at least 80 on the cupping test and offer a certain level of traceability back to the washing station. At Ezpz, we only offer specialty coffees.
specialty.question: Do you produce specialty coffee?

thirdWave.answer: Third-wave coffee emerged on the West Coast of the United States in the early 2000s. This movement treats coffee as an artisanal, local product. It emphasizes farming practices, production methods, quality, and an understanding of every actor involved from farm to cup.
thirdWave.question: What is third-wave coffee?

wholeBeans.answer: Not at all — you can choose your grind size when creating your order.
wholeBeans.question: Are your coffees available only as whole beans?

brewing.answer: Our coffees work well with various brewing methods — pour-over, French press, espresso, and more.
brewing.question: What is the best way to brew your coffee?

duration.answer: All our coffees are freshly roasted. We recommend grinding your coffee right before brewing to preserve its quality. With proper storage, your coffee will stay fresh for 5 to 6 weeks. After that, it may lose a bit of flavor (nothing dramatic), but nothing more.
duration.question: How long will my coffee stay fresh?

freshness.answer: All our bags are equipped with a one-way valve that prevents oxidation. Just reseal the bag after each use.
freshness.question: How does the coffee stay fresh?

storage.answer: Store your coffee in a cool, dry place, away from direct sunlight. Avoid refrigerating or freezing it, as this can alter the flavor.
storage.question: How should I store my coffee?

policy.answer: All our products are final sale.
policy.question: What is your return policy?

deliveryTime.answer: Orders are generally processed within 3–4 business days, with delivery times ranging from 3 to 5 days, depending on your location and the postal service.
deliveryTime.question: What is the delivery time?

regions.answer: We currently ship across Canada and offer international shipping in select regions. Shipping options and rates are calculated at checkout.
regions.question: Where do you ship your products?

termsOfUse.intro: Welcome to EZPZ.coffee. By accessing or using our website, services, or placing an order through EZPZ, you acknowledge that you have read, understood, and agreed to be bound by the following Terms of Use. If you do not agree with these terms, please do not use our platform.

contact.content: For any questions, please contact us at help@ezpz.coffee.
contact.title: Contact

intellectualProperty.content: All content, branding, designs, text, graphics, and platform materials are the property of EZPZ and may not be used without written consent. Customers confirm they hold rights or permission to use any uploaded design or material.
intellectualProperty.title: Intellectual Property

limitationLiability.content: EZPZ is not liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages resulting from the use of the site or products. Our responsibility is limited to producing and delivering the order as specified at the time of purchase.
limitationLiability.title: Limitation of Liability

modifications.content: EZPZ may update these Terms of Use at any time. Continued use of the service after updates constitutes acceptance of the revised terms.
modifications.title: Modifications to Terms

payments.content: Payments must be completed at checkout. Orders are not processed without successful payment. Pricing may change without prior notice.
payments.title: Payments

content: Standard production time is 3–4 business days (open days) after the order is confirmed.
Shipping times may vary depending on carrier, location, or external factors outside of EZPZ's control.
EZPZ is not responsible for delays caused by carriers, customs, or force majeure.
productionShipping.title: Production & Shipping

content: EZPZ allows users to customize and produce coffee bags with no minimum quantity.
Once an order is submitted and confirmed, it enters production automatically.
All sales are final. No refunds or exchanges are permitted, including but not limited to personalized, custom or standard products.
Customers are responsible for verifying customization details (design, text, color, quantity, etc.) before checkout.
productsOrders.title: Products & Orders

useOfWebsite.content: You agree to use EZPZ in compliance with applicable laws and regulations. You may not use the platform for any unlawful or unauthorized purpose.
useOfWebsite.title: Use of the Website

userContent.content: By uploading artwork or text, you grant EZPZ the right to reproduce and print it for the purpose of fulfilling your order. You are fully responsible for ensuring your content does not infringe on copyright, trademark, or third-party rights.
userContent.title: User Content & Custom Designs
